# CWE-93 positive: CRLF injected into HTTP header value
lang: go
file: CWE-93-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-93 Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences
// Vulnerable line: redirect URL copied into Location header raw.
func SetRedirect(c *gin.Context) {
	next := c.Query("next")
	c.Header("Location", "https://app.example/login?continue="+next)
	c.Status(http.StatusFound)
}
